goal: ideal_prime_constraint[D](zero_ideal[D]) = forall(x0: D, x1: D) { zero_ideal(x0 * x1) implies zero_ideal(x0) or zero_ideal(x1) }
proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1 * x2) or (x0(x1) or x0(x2)) } = ideal_prime_constraint[T0](x0) }[D](zero_ideal[D])
let w0: D satisfy { exists(k0: D) { zero_ideal(w0 * k0) and (not zero_ideal(w0) and not zero_ideal(k0)) } }
let w1: D satisfy { zero_ideal(w0 * w1) and (not zero_ideal(w0) and not zero_ideal(w1)) }
let w2: D satisfy { zero_ideal(w0 * w2) and (not zero_ideal(w0) and not zero_ideal(w2)) }
function(x0: D, x1: D) { not zero_ideal(x0 * x1) or zero_ideal(x0) or zero_ideal(x1) }(w0, w2)
